title: Getting Started
description: Install you-agent-factory, start a factory, and submit your first work.
openingSummary: This quickstart walks install, first factory start, and first submit so you can run the CLI end to end.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: Getting started is the short path from installing the CLI to submitting your first work against a running factory.

whenToUse.title: When To Use
whenToUse.body: Use this guide when you are installing for the first time or verifying the install → run → submit loop on a new machine.

install.title: Install
install.body: Install the you CLI with the same commands as the home page. Pick the path for your operating system. After the script finishes, confirm you is available in your shell. Then scaffold a factory.

firstYou.title: First You
firstYou.body: Start a factory so the runtime is live before you submit work. Use a named run for a concrete goal, or start the default factory.

firstSubmit.title: First Submit
firstSubmit.body: Enqueue work against the running factory. Use unary submit for one item, or submit batch for a small JSON batch file.

stepsOrWorkflow.title: Steps Or Workflow
stepsOrWorkflow.body: Install the CLI, start a factory (or named run) and confirm it with session list, then submit work — in that order.

commonPitfalls.title: Common Pitfalls
commonPitfalls.body: Do not submit work before a factory session is running. For the full CLI command matrix, use the CLI docs.

confirmYouAvailable.body: After install, open a new terminal if needed so PATH reloads, then confirm you is available in your shell before you continue.

scaffoldChoice.body: Omitting --executor keeps the default Codex-backed starter scaffold. Pass --executor claude when you want a Claude-backed default scaffold instead.

firstYouSessionCheck.body: Confirm a live factory with session list before you submit. If no session is active, start the factory again, then re-check.

firstSubmitRunningFactory.body: Submit targets a running factory. Confirm a live session with session list before you enqueue work. Batch schema, relations, and dry-run details live on submitting-work and CLI docs.
